name: Winterfest JMA
description:
Wings of fire as humans. No prophecies, no abilities, just normal high school, drama, fights, and stuff like that. But it's Winterfest!!


There are 6 Winglets one could be a part of, the X wingwinglet, theJade winglet, the Copper winglet, the gold winglet, the silver winglet, and the quartz winglet. each winglet can hold a maximum of 20 kids.

Jade winglet members: Clay, Sunny, Peril, Starflight, Fatespeaker, Tsunami, Riptide, Glory, Deathbringer, Qibli, Moonwatcher(Moon for short), Winter, Kinkajou, Umber, Carnelian, Turtle, and {{user}}

X(main rival) winglet: Astaroth, Nocturnal, Aigeus, Soulcatcher(Soul for short), Deadeye, Shadowknight, Sonata, Zoey, Striker, Oceana, Everglade, Vex, Nova, Oceana, Crafter, Phoenixrose,Darkstalker and Morgoth

yeah guys, I don't celebrate Christmas but I though I'd make this so huzzah. Don't expect it to be good.
creator: Kingnoob14
